Video.summary: A prospector has hit a vein, and he's not about to share it with anyone, not even his partner.
Video.title: The Breaking Point

Video.summary: An outlaw's daughter feels that her father was murdered unjustly and is bent on revenge.
Video.title: Girl with a Gun

Video.summary: Reuel Gridley pays off a bet by donating a bag of flour to a fund for the Civil War wounded.
Video.title: The $275,000 Sack of Flour

Video.summary: A horticulturist heads out West to identify new plants and encounters challenges along the way.
Video.title: The Grass Man

Video.summary: Plagued by gold thefts, Denver bankers set up their own mint in the bank basement.
Video.title: The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.

Image.alt: The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.

Video.summary: Lawmen Pete Gabriel and Joe Phy were friends, then Kitty Bolton came along.
Video.title: Loss of Faith

Video.summary: An outlaw and teamster help miners.
Video.title: The Debt

Video.summary: An attorney takes the case of a famed gunman who is charged with murder.
Video.title: Diamond Field Jack

Video.summary: A father who raised a cold-hearted killer worries his younger son may turn out the same way.
Video.title: Deadly Decision

Video.summary: The Dalton brothers stage simultaneous robberies of two banks in Coffeyville.
Video.title: Three Minutes to Eternity

Video.summary: As survivors of the Donner Party recuperate, William Eddy grieves the loss of his wife and children.
Video.title: The Hastings Cut-off

Video.summary: When Doc Holliday shoots a man who cheated him at cards, he becomes a target himself.
Video.title: The Quiet and the Fury

Video.summary: A down-and-out cowboy pines after a wealthy rancher's daughter.
Video.title: See the Elephant and Hear the Owl

Image.alt: See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl

Video.summary: The mayor of El Paso seeks cleaner water for the city and attempts financing by selling main street.
Video.title: The Streets of El Paso

Video.summary: Mary likes the attention of many men, but that causes trouble when one is murdered over her.
Video.title: Queen of Spades

Video.summary: Widow Lucy Tutaine decides to sue the railroad when her cow is hit by a train.
Video.title: The Train and Lucy Tutaine

Video.summary: An ex-convict dispenses law from his tent in a mining camp.
Video.title: The Law of the Round Tent

Image.alt: The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent
The Law of the Round Tent

Video.summary: A minister has ambitious, but not very popular, plans of building a church in Whiskey Gulch.
Video.title: Miracle at Whiskey Gulch

Video.summary: A charlatan rainmaker sparks a range war.
Video.title: Big John and the Rainmaker

Video.summary: A pioneer fends off a trapper's persistent offers to buy the pioneer's Indian wife.
Video.title: From the Earth, a Heritage

Video.summary: A lawyer (Ronald Reagan) sues a man who killed a boy's dog.
Video.title: Tribute to the Dog

Video.summary: A former Confederate officer tries to help the family of a soldier killed in battle.
Video.title: Paid in Full

Video.summary: A petty drunk transporting a new church bell to Volcano, Calif., decides to sell it off instead.
Video.title: A Bell for Volcano

Video.summary: Native brothers must find a tribal renegade.
Video.title: Death in the Desert

Video.summary: Ronald Reagan plays a sheriff who tries enforcing the law without a gun.
Video.title: No Gun Behind His Badge

Video.summary: An Army officer helps a young man track down his sister, who was captured by Natives years before.
Video.title: The Lawless Have Laws

Video.summary: A Quaker farmer undertakes a journey out west with apple-tree seedlings.
Video.title: Traveling Trees

Video.summary: Challenges are faced as a boat on wheels travels across the prairie and through Native country.
Video.title: Dry Water Sailors

Video.summary: A freight hauler marries a rich girl by mistake and has a week to court her before it is annulled.
Video.title: The Courtship of Carrie Huntington

Video.summary: A prospector helps a dentist who has been beaten and robbed by bandits.
Video.title: The Solid Gold Cavity

Video.summary: The mayor of Deadwood comes up with a manufactured hero to lure tourists into his dying town.
Video.title: The Resurrection of Deadwood Dick

Video.summary: Ignoring his brother's warnings, young Roy Bean gets involved in a rivalry over a pretty girl.
Video.title: Sense of Justice

Video.summary: After a settler's son is taken during an Apache raid, an Army doctor leads a small band for rescue.
Video.title: The Hero of Apache Pass

Video.summary: Calamity Jane meets Wild Bill Hickok.
Video.title: A Calamity Called Jane

Video.summary: The skeletons of two prospectors give Ed Schieffelin a clue to the location of a silver mine.
Video.title: Silver Tombstone

Video.summary: In Apache country, a missionary engages in a philosophic battle with an escaped murderer.
Video.title: A Man Called Abraham

Video.summary: A rivalry over a pretty woman inadvertently causes trouble between cavalrymen and Natives.
Video.title: The Hero of Fort Halleck

Video.summary: After her father is jailed for contempt of court, Kate Melville takes over his job as sheriff.
Video.title: Kate Melville and the Law

Video.summary: The theft of turkeys being brought to market sets up a showdown between lawlessness and justice.
Video.title: The Great Turkey War

Video.summary: A young Chinese man uses his ancient book to help a miner win money at roulette.
Video.title: The Book

Video.summary: A four-dollar lawsuit is brought against an insurance company by a farmer who claims he was cheated.
Video.title: The Four-Dollar Law Suit

Video.summary: A sheriff pursues deadly gunslinger Sam Bolt and finds an unlikely ally in one of Bolt's partners.
Video.title: Brute Angel

Video.summary: A likable old miner starts losing friends when his luck takes a turn for the better.
Video.title: One Fast Injun

Video.summary: Prospector Jim Otis is taken hostage by robbers after he stumbles onto their loot.
Video.title: Solid Foundation

Video.summary: A rancher fights bandits.
Video.title: The Trouble with Taxes
